heading: BILINGUAL EDUCATION ALLOTMENT
operative_text: For each student in average daily attendance in a bilingual education or special language program under Subchapter B, Chapter 29, a district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment multiplied by: (1) for an emergent bilingual student, as defined by Section 29.052: (A) 0.1; or (B) 0.15 if the student is in a bilingual education program using a dual language immersion/one-way or two-way program model; and (2) for a student not described by Subdivision (1), 0.05 if the student is in a bilingual education program using a dual language immersion/two-way program model.
_note: Subsections (a-1) through (e) also operative; operative_text captures core allotment formula from Subsection (a). Full section includes alternative language education method allotment (a-1, a-2), 55% use requirement (b), reporting rules (c), commissioner review (d), and withholding provisions (e).
